purpose: Lightweight evidence registry for core ERP source materials used in vendor diligence, board preparation, and delivery-model decisions.
scope: Initial pass covers NetSuite, KPMG, CFGI, ERP selection artifacts, and current board-level ERP outputs. It is an index layer, not a document portal.

documents.title: NetSuite Offer Summary
documents.summary: March 5 commercial workbook covering licenses, support, maintenance, and implementation economics for the NetSuite proposal. Superseded by the March 17 V2 offer summary.
keyQuestionsAnswered: What is the current year-1 commercial envelope?
Which recurring and non-recurring cost elements are included?
Does the package include inventory-related licensing in the baseline?
documents.sourceEmailSubject: ABIVAX x NetSuite : Following up on our meeting

citationRefs.label: archive note
citationRefs.note: README summarizes year-1 economics and notes Inventory Management in the base package.

documents.title: SuiteSuccess Financials Premium SOW ABIVAX - DRAFT - 05032026
documents.summary: March 5 draft implementation SOW from NetSuite Customer Success. Superseded by the March 17 V3 draft SOW.
keyQuestionsAnswered: What functional scope is included in the current NetSuite implementation baseline?
Is the current SOW structured as a single phase or a phased rollout?
documents.sourceEmailSubject: ABIVAX x NetSuite : Following up on our meeting

citationRefs.label: commercial watchout
citationRefs.note: Archive note says the SOW includes P2P, R2R, O2C, and Design to Build / Inventory.

citationRefs.note: NetSuite package findings record the single-phase scope read.

documents.title: NetSuite Offer Summary V2
documents.summary: Revised March 17 commercial workbook. This is the current source of truth for NetSuite licensing, support, implementation, training, and optional add-ons.
keyQuestionsAnswered: What is the latest year-1 commercial envelope from NetSuite?
Did the revised package change recurring or implementation economics?
Does the revised package still include inventory-related licensing in the baseline?
documents.sourceEmailSubject: Re: [External] : RE: ABIVAX x NetSuite : Following up on our meeting

citationRefs.label: archive note
citationRefs.note: README now distinguishes the March 17 current package from the March 5 superseded baseline.

documents.title: SuiteSuccess Financials Premium SOW UK - ABIVAX draft V3 17032026
documents.summary: Revised March 17 draft SOW from NetSuite. It still reflects a broad implementation scope and explicitly covers bank account reconciliation in the Record to Report workstream.
keyQuestionsAnswered: What functional scope is included in the latest NetSuite implementation baseline?
Does the revised SOW still include O2C and inventory in phase 1?
Are bank reconciliations explicitly covered in the revised SOW?

citationRefs.label: archive note

documents.title: 032026_Proposal_AMOA_ABIVAX_v1
documents.summary: Broad AMOA-style support proposal covering functional assistance, change management, and project management support for the ERP implementation.
keyQuestionsAnswered: What support scope is KPMG proposing?
What fee and man-day structure is KPMG asking for?
Does the proposal drift into broad PMO / governance ownership?

citationRefs.label: archive note
citationRefs.note: README captures the fee structure and broad three-workstream scope.

citationRefs.label: parsed text
citationRefs.note: Parsed text sidecar exists for deeper retrieval.

documents.title: CFGI_Abivax_NS_Proposal_03.10.26
documents.summary: CFGI two-phase NetSuite implementation proposal used primarily as scope and commercial leverage rather than an active board-week switch recommendation.
keyQuestionsAnswered: How would a phased implementation split Phase 1 and Phase 2?
What does CFGI price for the phased delivery alternative?
Which items does CFGI exclude or assume Abivax will handle?

citationRefs.label: archive note
citationRefs.note: README summarizes the two-phase split, fee levels, and exclusions.

documents.title: Abivax_CFGI_PMO&Change proposal
documents.summary: Focused CFGI proposal for Paris-side PMO, business-process support, and change management around the NetSuite program, positioned as a narrower support layer than CFGI's earlier implementation proposal.
keyQuestionsAnswered: What would CFGI charge for a narrower local PMO and change support lane?
How does CFGI frame its Paris-side support around Mike and the local teams?
Is this proposal comparable to a narrowed KPMG support package rather than a full implementation alternative?

citationRefs.label: archive note
citationRefs.note: README captures the estimated fee range, time-and-materials pricing, scope shape, and comparison angle versus KPMG.
